date_notes: Approximate date of the public statement; confirm exact date from the source.
title_en: Statement attributing the renewables approval pause to an electricity-operator request
description_en: The Premier publicly stated that the pause on renewable approvals had been requested by the Alberta Electricity System Operator. Access-to-information records later indicated that the operator's chief executive had recorded discomfort with the request and that the request had originated with government.

relations.framing_en: A public statement attributing the approval pause to a request from the electricity system operator, set against access-to-information records in which the operator's chief executive recorded discomfort and the request's origin in government.

verification_notes: Say/do pair (statement side) from harvest. Both the statement and the FOI record rest on R-D0000001; quote the AESO email language verbatim and confirm the statement date before publishing.

update_log.change: Created from harvest batch; conflicts_with EVT-105; suppressed.
